privileged_info_summary: Task creates a test user 'monitor_analyst' (Sarah Chen) on NextGen Connect 4.5.0 with email sarah.chen@mercygeneral.org and password M0nitor2024!Secure. Mercy General Hospital is a real 310-bed nonprofit hospital in Sacramento, CA. NextGen Connect is the official healthcare integration platform from NextGen Healthcare. The API endpoint POST /api/users exists and requires X-Requested-With: OpenAPI header. All metadata values are consistent with task description and meet NextGen Connect requirements.
